reviews.review_title: I want to go there now
reviews.review_description:
I am familiar with Georgia through my university studies and have always had an interest in visiting. This presentation is amazing. You feel like you really there. 

This application makes me want to visit. I had no idea that Tbilisi has so much to offer. It shows an urban center, quiet streets and some secluded parts for the city.

Now the hard part, getting there.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for the kind words! Tbilisi has even more to offer, trust us! 
We will keep up the work and very soon our apps may be able to help you with the "hard part" as well ;) 
Good luck and stay tuned! 
VRex Immersive team
